# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('stg-sql-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "stagingdb",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sqladmin",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator login name."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "defaultValue": "AzureSQL2024!",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator login password."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The location for all resources."
      }
    },
    "devIpRules": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        {
          "name": "DevIP1",
          "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
          "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
        }
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of development IP firewall rules. Replace with your actual development IPs."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "azureServicesRuleName": "AllowAzureServices"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
          "name": "[variables('azureServicesRuleName')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          }
        },
        {
          "copy": {
            "name": "devIpFirewallRulesCopy",
            "count": "[length(parameters('devIpRules'))]"
          },
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
          "name": "[parameters('devIpRules')[copyIndex('devIpFirewallRulesCopy')].name]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "[parameters('devIpRules')[copyIndex('devIpFirewallRulesCopy')].startIpAddress]",
            "endIpAddress": "[parameters('devIpRules')[copyIndex('devIpFirewallRulesCopy')].endIpAddress]"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "Basic",
        "tier": "Basic"
      },
      "properties": {
        "readScale": "Disabled",
        "requestedBackupStorageRedundancy": "Local",
        "sampleName": null
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    }
  }
}
